revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: undo wikidata additions from past 2 hours
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Audio%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{for|instructions on inserting audio files|Wikipedia:Creation and usage of media files#Audio}} {{for|audio files set off from text|Template:Listen}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} == Purpose == This template links to an audio file for quick listening. It is meant to be used inline with text, for pronunciations and the like. Please note that this just creates a link to the file and does not actually embed the file. If the file is Non-Free and only referenced via this template it is not in compliance with [[WP:NFCC#7|Wikipedia:Non-free content criteria § Policy #7]]. The template uses the [[mw:Extension:Phonos|Phonos]] MediaWiki extension to create an audio link that plays on click. == Usage == {{Audio|name of sound file|text to use as link to soundfile}} ; Example : '''Alabama''' ({{Audio|en-us-Alabama.ogg|pronunciation}}) is a state located in... : → '''Alabama''' ({{Audio|en-us-Alabama.ogg|pronunciation}}) is a state located in... == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Use this template to add an inline link to an audio file, preceded by a speaker icon.", "format": "inline", "params": { "1": { "label": "Audio file", "description": "Audio file to link to", "type": "wiki-file-name", "example": "En-uk-London.ogg", "required": true }, "2": { "label": "Label", "description": "Text to replace the filename in the link", "type": "string", "example": "English pronunciation" } }, "paramOrder": [ "1", "2" ] } == See also == {{Audio templates}} {{Sandbox other| | }} [[Category:Audio templates]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
